message:
fix(pipeline): fix loop result capture and webhook fetch type

Bug fixes found in third fresh-eyes review:

1. Loop result capture used wrong context key:
   - Was looking for: `_step_${stepId}_result`
   - Correct key: `step_${stepId}_output`
   This caused loop iteration results to always be undefined.

2. Webhook fetch had TypeScript type error:
   - `body: string | undefined` incompatible with RequestInit.body
   - Fix: convert undefined to null with `body ?? null`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
